status: height: 50px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 28px 0 24px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary);
topbar-title: font-family: var(--font); font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.3px; color: var(--text-primary);
topbar-ico: width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 17px; background: var(--surface-2); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
timeline-h: font-family: var(--font); font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px;
cross-scroll: flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; scrollbar-width: none; padding: 0 16px 8px;
cross-dot: position: absolute; left: 4px; top: 6px; width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--happn); box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(255,72,101,0.18);
cross-card: display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: center; background: var(--surface-1); border: 1px solid var(--divider); border-radius: 18px; padding: 12px;
cross-av: width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; position: relative;
cross-name: font-family: var(--font); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary);
cross-where: font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 2px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
cross-heart: width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--happn); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; box-shadow: 0 6px 16px -4px rgba(255,72,101,0.5);
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; color: var(--text-tertiary); gap: 4px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600;
